message:
feat(connectors): implement ConnectorErrorMapping for all 87 connector error types

Complete the ConnectorErrorMapping trait adoption across every connector
crate, establishing the universal foundation for the ConnectorRuntime
migration. Each connector now depends on fcp-sdk and provides
from_async_error(), to_fcp_error(), is_retryable(), and retry_after()
through the trait, replacing the need for hand-rolled per-connector
error bridging.

This brings ConnectorErrorMapping coverage from ~11 to 87/87 (100%).
The Cargo.lock is updated to reflect the 66 new fcp-sdk dependencies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
